name: push_preserves_prefix_state
reason: Appending an operation preserves state at all prior versions — the new operation is invisible to prefix computations

name: version_zero_always_init
reason: Version 0 always returns `init_spec()` regardless of log contents — the initial state is hardcoded

name: single_op_state
reason: A single-element log at version 1 applies the op to init_spec — tests that the recursion unfolds correctly for the minimal non-trivial case

name: dispatch_mut_spec_unconstrained
reason: `dispatch_mut_spec` is a trait method with no constraints — any implementation can define arbitrary state transitions, and the spec blindly trusts it

name: refinement_proof_phantom
